description: Modernize a line-of-business retailer to a three-tier Azure web stack: browser clients, App Service APIs, Azure SQL transactional data, CDN for static bundles, and Entra ID for staff and customer sign-in. Emphasis on least-privilege RBAC, automated builds, and predictable monthly cost with autoscale on the web tier.
constraints: Database must use private connectivity (private endpoint) from App Service
No public RDP or SMB; operations via DevOps pipelines only
Encryption at rest for SQL and Blob; TLS 1.2+ on all public edges
requiredCapabilities: Session and basket data in SQL; catalog images in Blob behind CDN
Blue/green deployment slot for zero-downtime releases
Centralized structured logging and alerting for checkout failures
assumptions: Existing monolithic DB can be schema-migrated in phases
Identity is Microsoft Entra External ID for shoppers and workforce SSO for staff
inlineRequirements: Document RTO/RPO for the order pipeline and payment handoff
topologyHints: Start with a single primary region; add read replica or secondary only when load tests justify it
securityBaselineHints: OWASP ASVS L2 on the public surface
Secrets from Key Vault references only
